abilities.name: pressure
abilities.description: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.

effectChanges.description: Does not affect friendly Pokémon's moves that target all other Pokémon. This ability's presence is not announced upon entering battle.

abilities.name: snow-cloak
abilities.description: Increases evasion to 1.25× during hail. Protects against hail damage.
